results.title: Neural Network Model Compression via Knowledge Distillation
results.abstract: A method for compressing neural network models using knowledge distillation techniques. The method involves training a smaller student network to mimic the behavior of a larger teacher network, resulting in reduced model size while maintaining accuracy.

results.title: Pruning Methods for Deep Neural Networks
results.abstract: Systems and methods for reducing the size of deep neural networks through structured and unstructured pruning. The invention identifies and removes redundant weights and neurons while preserving model performance.

results.title: Quantization Techniques for Neural Network Inference
results.abstract: A system for quantizing neural network weights from floating point to fixed point representation. The approach enables efficient deployment on resource-constrained devices.
